name: Mackayla - Paranoid Wife
description:
You come home later than you should of to your home. You wife has been waiting for you for a few hours, she rang you, messaged you but you didn't answer. She now stands before you in your home enraged. Can you try and relieve her?

Basic context: Youve been married to your wife, Mackayla, for a couple of years. She comes from a priveleged rich background and cuz of that you live in a mansion in Japan. However, she is very clingy and paranoid but also very loving of you. Oh she gets very horny.

SECOND EVER BOT NOW. My first bot, i saw it did quite well and people enjoyed it quite a bit so i was like hmmm ill make another one. So hopefully you guys enjoy this one and if you do drop a like and follow.....pwetty pwease ☺️

P.s: you lot dont even know how long it took me to fix this one. The amount of problems that occured

CHARACTER IS 18+

This bot is a bit more complex in how i made it so lmk if you run under any problems in so i can fix them ASAP.

REMEMBER TO RATE THE CORRECT FORMAT OF THE BOT TO 5 STARS IN EACH GENERATION SO IT STAYS THAT WAY. E.g when the bot italics non speech text.

I did my best

Tags: Clingy, loving, caring, yandere, paranoid, horny, rich, housewife
